description: baseline: Qwen2.5-14B Q4_K_M ngl=99 fa=on b=2048 ub=512 t=8 poll=50 f16-kv @ d=2048; ppl reference (gate threshold 4.626)
ctk/ctv=q8_0 — real -10% tg for ~0.2 GB VRAM saved; quality fine (ppl+0.07%) but bad speed trade
fa=off — real -17% tg / -27% pp; flash attention load-bearing
nkvo=1 (KV cache off GPU) — -74% tg; PCIe round-trips per attention step
poll=0 — tg tie within drift; pp +4.5% (not the objective)
threads=16 — tg tie within drift; CPU threads neutral when fully GPU-offloaded
PHASE2 server baseline no spec [PRE-LOCK — clock 1811, not same basis as rows below]
spec n_max=3 — +7% (51% accept); VRAM over budget [PRE-LOCK]
spec n_max=8 — +24% vs no-spec (30% accept) [PRE-LOCK; confirmed 36.8 at locked 1800]
spec n_max=16 — -22% vs no-spec; over-drafts, rejected tokens waste verify compute
spec n_max=10 — +17%; close second to n_max=8
spec n_max=8 p_min=0.3 — 34.6 < p_min=0 (36.8); p_min=0 optimal
spec n_max=8 p_min=0.6 — 34.9, 75% accept but still slower; clock 1787 (light throttle)
spec n_max=4 — 32.0; clock 1778 (throttled); directionally below n_max=8
spec n_max=12 — 31.1; declining past n_max=8/10 peak
spec n_max=14 — 29.1; approaching no-spec baseline, over-drafting
spec n_max=8 p_min=0.9 — 97% accept but tg collapses; want tokens/step not max accept rate
spec n_max=8 Q4_K_M draft — 32.0 vs Q8 35.7; draft accuracy matters more than draft speed at 0.5B
no-spec temp=0.7 — equal to temp=0 (29.2 vs 30.2); sampling cost is negligible for plain gen
spec n_max=8 temp=0.7 — accept 30%->24%; spec gain shrinks from +22% to +5% at higher temp
spec n_max=8 temp=0.7 min_p=0.1 — sharper dist partially recovers (24.3% accept); still below temp=0
